description: Curated module bundles for common project shapes. Pass the matching modules list to `claude plugin install dhpk@dhpk --config modules=<csv>`. The interactive installer (`scripts/install.sh`) exposes these as quick presets. Module identifiers MUST exist in `manifests/module-catalog.json` (the SSOT); profiles here are convenience aliases, not new modules.

minimal.description: Generic core only — no language/framework modules. Suitable for any project; gets the review hooks, codex/git workflow skills, and harness scripts. (OpenSpec wrappers were unbundled in v0.2.1 — install the OpenSpec plugin separately if you need that workflow.)

legacy-php-yii.description: PHP 5.6 + Yii 1.1 + PHPUnit 5.7 stack. Activates all three modules at once for full Yii-1.1 path-trigger coverage and AR/CDbCriteria guidance.

php-only.description: PHP 5.6 baseline without Yii or PHPUnit. Useful for PHP projects not on Yii.

js-only.description: JS / TS tooling only. ESLint tier strategy, post-edit lint feedback, pre-commit lint + typecheck gate. No PHP modules.

js-fullstack.description: Legacy PHP/Yii stack + JS tooling. Suitable for monolith projects with both a Yii backend and a non-trivial JS/TS frontend.

ios-app.description: Full iOS/SwiftUI app stack: Swift 6 language, SwiftUI + MVVM + Coordinator, iOS platform SDK (Core Data encryption / CryptoKit-Keychain / Vision OCR / LocalAuthentication / UserNotifications / HealthKit / privacy), Swift Testing, and Xcode tooling (SwiftLint post-edit + xcodebuild/SPM pre-commit gate). Suitable for an iOS 17+ SwiftUI app like babylon/RxScan.

python-api.description: Python async web-API backend: Python tooling (ruff post-edit + ruff/type-check pre-commit gate), FastAPI + SQLAlchemy-async + Alembic guidance, and pytest-asyncio test strategy. No frontend module.

python-fullstack.description: Python async backend + JS/TS frontend: the python-api bundle plus the js module (ESLint tier strategy + pre-commit lint/typecheck gate). Suitable for a FastAPI + React/Vite project like ccas. Set python_project_roots=backend when the pyproject.toml lives under a subdir.

full.description: The legacy-PHP/Yii reference stack plus every cross-stack (JS / Vue 2 / Python / iOS / library-author) module. For each mutually-exclusive version family one representative is enabled (php-5.6 for PHP, phpunit-5.7 for PHPUnit); the conflicting variants and the modern-Laravel world are listed in `excludes` with reasons. Invariant: full.modules ∪ full.excludes = every shipped module id, and the two sets are disjoint.

excludes.php-7.4: PHP version variant — conflicts with php-5.6 (chosen PHP representative for full)
excludes.php-8.x: PHP version variant — conflicts with php-5.6
excludes.phpunit-9: requires PHP 7+ — conflicts with phpunit-5.7 (chosen to match php-5.6)
excludes.laravel-5.4: Laravel major (mutually exclusive) — legacy modern-Laravel world, not the php-5.6/Yii stack
excludes.laravel-mix: Laravel-world frontend build toolchain — pairs with the excluded Laravel majors
